rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks only into component type or implementation scope based on whether the contract refers to visible features or implementation-level bindings.
Preserve AADL architecture by using only visible features and avoiding introduction of non-declared ports, types, or properties.
generic_rules: Component type annexes should contain contracts over visible ports; implementation annexes should contain bindings to subcomponent ports.
Contracts must use only identifiers explicitly visible in the target scope or declared locally within the same annex.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `annex agree {** ... **};` to enclose all AGREE content.
Declare constants and equations before guarantees that reference them.
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL properties (e.g., Period, Deadline) as if they are AGREE variables.
Do not infer or invent identifiers not present in the component's visible scope.
